calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by self represented plaintiff. There being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to JAN-29-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file and serve amended complaint. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge Gail Dekreon, Clerk: R. Wong, Not reported (D501)
